title: Jobless
description: Terrified of j*bs? Keep your server j*b-free with this cursed word filter.
body:
# 👻 J\*bless

**Are you and your server players scared of a J\*b?**  
Does the mere mention of a r\*sume send shivers down your spine?  
**`Jobless`** is the plugin for the proudly unemployed Minecraft community.

---

## 💼 What does it do?

Jobless automatically censors cursed, w\*rk-related words in player chat — such as:

- `j*b`
- `appl*cation`
- `r*sume`
- `car*er`
- `int*rview`
- `l*nkedin` (yep, even that one)

With a customizable censorship style like `J*b`, `J🕳B`, or whatever format you choose, it ensures your server remains a **safe, emp\*yment-free zone**.

---

## 🔧 Features

- 👁️ Detects and censors spooky j*b words
- ✨ MiniMessage support for full custom formatting
- 🌐 Pulls custom word lists from remote sources (like GitHub)
- ⚙️ Fully configurable via `config.yml`
- 🔄 Optionally refreshes word list periodically

---

## 📥 Contribute to the Dread

Want to add your own c\*rporate horrors?  
Contribute to the [w\*rd list file](https://github.com/your/repo/blob/main/haunted-careers.txt) and expand the lexicon of l\*bor fear.

---

## 🧪 Ideal For:

- Meme servers
- Roleplay servers rejecting modern s\*ciety
- Anarchy against cap\*talism

---

## 🙅‍♂️ Supported Words We *Definitely* Won’t Say

- `int*rnship`
- `f*ll-time`
- `n*ne to five`
- `sal*ry`
- `prom*tion`

> We don’t w\*rk here. Or anywhere.

---

## 💀 Stay Unemployed. Stay Safe. Use Jobless.
